# bug-080 adaptive shutdown fixtures

Source: Mac mini 0.2.8 run `bug080-owned2-20260531-213101`, round `r1`, SHA `04da933fb7809dd4cc2aba548311e8fea25af1a5`.

The tmux and verdict files in this directory keep the real bug-080 lines from the realistic-tester capture. `r1-state-selected.json` keeps only the runtime fields needed by the public acceptance contract while preserving the real session names, leader receiver shape, and null adaptive display identifiers that triggered bug-080.
